import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { toast } from 'react-toastify'; import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext'; const Register = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ username: '', email: '', password: '', password_confirm: '', first_name: '', last_name: '', role: 'operator', company: '', phone: '', }); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const { register } = useAuth(); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value, }); }; const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setLoading(true); if (formData.password !== formData.password_confirm) { toast.error('Passwords do not match'); setLoading(false); return; } const result = await register(formData); if (result.success) { toast.success('Account created successfully! Welcome aboard!'); } else { const errorMessage = typeof result.error === 'object' ? Object.values(result.error).flat().join(', ') : result.error; toast.error(errorMessage); } setLoading(false); }; return (
⚓ MaritimeTracker

); }; export default Register;
